target: Question Bank Stats - Dynamic Test Counting Fix
summary: Bug fix verified successfully. Backend API /api/question-bank/stats now returns correct dynamic counts: total_questions=1420 (was 680), full_tests=20 (was 8), topics_count=47 (was 18). Frontend correctly displays these dynamic values in the header and Full Tests tab cards.

features_tested.details: Dynamic count from lesson registry (was hardcoded 18)

features_tested.feature: GET /api/full-test/sets returns 8 academic and 4 general sets
Frontend QB header displays correct dynamic stats
features_tested.details: Shows 1420 questions, 20 tests, 4 skills, 47 topics (no fallback values)

features_tested.feature: Frontend Full Tests tab Cambridge card shows 8 tests
features_tested.details: Displays '8 Tests Available' dynamically from stats.cambridge_tests

features_tested.feature: Frontend Full Tests tab AI card shows 12 tests

context_for_next_testing_agent: Question Bank stats bug is fixed. Backend correctly counts all tests dynamically (Cambridge + AI Academic + AI General). Frontend displays correct values. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_qb_stats.py for regression testing.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: QB stats page showed static/incorrect numbers: 8 full tests, 680 questions, 18 topics
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Backend endpoint only counted Cambridge tests, not AI full tests. Topics count was hardcoded.
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Backend now dynamically counts ALL tests using get_all_test_sets() and get_test_by_id() from full_test module, topics from lesson registry
bug_fix_verification.result: FIXED - Now shows 1420 questions, 20 tests (8+8+4), 47 topics
